## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List the commands you ran, or explain why a command was not applicable.

```bash
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test
pnpm format:check
pnpm i18n:verify
pnpm --filter @open-meet/server test:e2e
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the relevant issue, if one exists.
- [ ] I kept this PR scoped to a single change or clearly related set of changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated docs, examples, or screenshots when needed.
- [ ] I updated locale files and ran `pnpm i18n:verify` if user-facing copy changed.
- [ ] I called out schema, env, auth, or security-sensitive changes.

## Screenshots or recordings

Add visuals here for UI changes.

## Reviewer notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
